title: Red Hat Security Advisory: audiofile security update
overview:
An update for audiofile is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 7 Extended Lifecycle Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux Server Optional (v. 7 ELS)
full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: audiofile security update

An update for audiofile is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 7 Extended Lifecycle Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for audiofile is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 7 Extended Lifecycle Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
audiofile-0.3.6-10.el7_9.src.rpm
audiofile-0.3.6-10.el7_9.i686.rpm
audiofile-0.3.6-10.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
audiofile-debuginfo-0.3.6-10.el7_9.i686.rpm
audiofile-debuginfo-0.3.6-10.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
audiofile-devel-0.3.6-10.el7_9.i686.rpm
audiofile-devel-0.3.6-10.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
audiofile-0.3.6-10.el7_9.s390.rpm
audiofile-0.3.6-10.el7_9.s390x.rpm
audiofile-debuginfo-0.3.6-10.el7_9.s390.rpm
audiofile-debuginfo-0.3.6-10.el7_9.s390x.rpm
audiofile-devel-0.3.6-10.el7_9.s390.rpm
audiofile-devel-0.3.6-10.el7_9.s390x.rpm
audiofile-0.3.6-10.el7_9.ppc.rpm
audiofile-0.3.6-10.el7_9.ppc64.rpm
audiofile-debuginfo-0.3.6-10.el7_9.ppc.rpm
audiofile-debuginfo-0.3.6-10.el7_9.ppc64.rpm
audiofile-devel-0.3.6-10.el7_9.ppc.rpm
audiofile-devel-0.3.6-10.el7_9.ppc64.rpm
audiofile-0.3.6-10.el7_9.ppc64le.rpm
audiofile-debuginfo-0.3.6-10.el7_9.ppc64le.rpm
audiofile-devel-0.3.6-10.el7_9.ppc64le.rpm

CVE-2025-50950: A flaw was found in the Audiofile library. Processing a specially crafted input file can trigger a NULL pointer dereference, causing a crash to the application linked to the library and resulting in a denial of service.
